gaps: Richer petition-stage docket snapshots for historic Supreme Court cases
Corpus-local examples keyed by event kind and disposition label with short explanations of label assignment
helpful: fedcourts query for resolved SCOTUS priors
notes: The snapshot was enough to make a conservative non-grant prediction, but it lacked docket entries and petition-stage dates. I used local corpus priors only for aggregate context and did not fetch new case facts.
